message:
test(search-core): add 16 tests for error, document, and engine modules

- error.rs: 5 new tests (display formatting, error_type_count for all 9 variants)
- document.rs: 6 new tests (trait coverage, edge cases, all DocKind variants)
- engine.rs: 5 new tests (struct traits, serde, Send+Sync bounds)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
